working-days-calculator.description: Count working days between two dates, excluding weekends and selected holidays.

iching.title: Tianji
iching.idleStatus: Tap 6 times to cast a hexagram. Lines are stacked from bottom to top in order: 1st to 6th line.
iching.guideTitle: First time using this? Here's how casting works
iching.guideBody1: Each cast simulates three coins to generate one line. After six casts, you get a full hexagram with lines arranged bottom to top.
iching.guideBody2: Because each line is yin or yang, there are 64 possible hexagrams. You will see the hexagram name and a short meaning for quick reading.
iching.readTitle: How should I read primary and transformed hexagrams?
iching.readBody1: The primary hexagram reflects your current state or question. If changing lines appear (6 or 9), a transformed hexagram indicates the next direction of change.
iching.readBody2: Without changing lines, read only the primary hexagram. With a transformed hexagram, treat the primary as the present and the transformed as the destination.
iching.linesProgressTemplate: {count}/6 lines cast. Continue to complete the hexagram.
iching.statusWithChangingLines: The primary hexagram shows the present state, while the transformed hexagram shows the direction of change.
iching.statusWithoutChangingLines: This cast has no changing lines, so you can focus on the primary hexagram.

lineTypeGuides.name: Changing Yin
lineTypeGuides.description: A broken moving line. It changes to yang in the transformed hexagram.

lineTypeGuides.name: Stable Yang
lineTypeGuides.description: A solid stable line. It stays the same in both hexagrams.

lineTypeGuides.name: Stable Yin
lineTypeGuides.description: A broken stable line. It remains unchanged.

lineTypeGuides.name: Changing Yang
lineTypeGuides.description: A solid moving line. It changes to yin in the transformed hexagram.
